bird.name: 绒顶唐纳雀
bird.summary: 绒顶唐纳雀（台湾作絨頂雀，学名：Catamblyrhynchus diadema），是雀形目唐纳雀科的一种鸟类，属于单型的绒顶唐纳雀属（学名：Catamblyrhynchus）。 绒顶唐纳雀体重约14.13克，翼长约65毫米，喙宽度约4.8毫米，喙厚度约7.4毫米，嘴峰长约10…

relations.subject: 绒顶唐纳雀
relations.evidence: They live in montane forests and secondary forests near bamboo
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 绒顶唐纳雀
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is humid montane forests and it is always found in close association with Chusquea bamboo
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 绒顶唐纳雀
relations.evidence: Plushcaps prefer to live in montane forest or secondary woodland by Chusquea bamboo which they use to find food
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
